text:
In a disputed case, the department may determine:

(1) the classification to which a vehicle belongs; and

(2) the amount of the registration fee for the vehicle.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 502. Registration of Vehicles
##### § 502.056 — Disputed Classification of Vehicle

In a disputed case, the department may determine:

    (1) the classification to which a vehicle belongs; and

    (2) the amount of the registration fee for the vehicle.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

the classification to which a vehicle belongs; and
the amount of the registration fee for the vehicle.
